occupation_title: Aircraft Structure, Surfaces, Rigging, and Systems Assemblers
occupation_definition: Assemble, fit, fasten, and install parts of airplanes, space vehicles, or missiles, such as tails, wings, fuselage, bulkheads, stabilizers, landing gear, rigging and control equipment, or heating and ventilating systems.
